accurate.why: All claims are accurate and consistent with the bill text, with specific figures traceable to the text.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; all provisions traceable to the bill text.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the bill as FY2025 legislative branch appropriations.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes amendments to Energy Policy Act, child care center fund, fiduciary clarification, and other statutory changes.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes exceptions for national security on Chinese drone ban, waiver for telecom ban, and contractor bonus exceptions.

effective_dates.why: Notes FY2025 and subsequent year applicability and phased telecom ban.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers all major funding recipients and key policy riders in detail.

concise.why: Appropriately comprehensive for a complex appropriations bill.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names all agencies, committees, and companies referenced.

correct_figures.why: $619.3M Capitol Police salaries, $213.2M general expenses, $500,000 CBO transparency, and other figures accurately stated.
